scenarios.description: No polecats active, everything healthy → idle or report
scenarios.output: {"tool": "gt_mail_send", "args": {"recipient": "mayor/", "subject": "ESCALATION: bcc mail dirty", "body": "Polecat hq abandoned bcc mail. Needs investigation."}}

args.subject: ESCALATION: bcc mail dirty
args.body: Polecat hq abandoned bcc mail. Needs investigation.

scenarios.description: Active healthy polecat → peek, monitor, or do nothing
scenarios.output: {"tool": "gt_mail_send", "args": {"recipient": "mayor/", "subject": "ESCALATION: gastown/furiosa (dead)", "body": "Polecat furiosa is dead. Needs reassignment."}}

args.subject: ESCALATION: gastown/furiosa (dead)
args.body: Polecat furiosa is dead. Needs reassignment.

scenarios.output: {"tool": "gt_mail_send", "args": {"recipient": "mayor/", "subject": "ESCALATION: gastown/furiosa (dead)", "body": "Surveying done on gastown/mayor but no progress detected. Needs investigation."}}

args.subject: ESCALATION: gastown/furiosa (dead)
args.body: Surveying done on gastown/mayor but no progress detected. Needs investigation.

scenarios.description: Completed polecat, clean git → nuke, close bead, verify git, or report
scenarios.output: {"tool": "gt_mail_send", "args": {"recipient": "mayor/", "subject": "ESCALATION: gastown/furiosa", "body": "Surveying phase 2 complete. Branch merged and branch push. No issues found."}}

args.subject: ESCALATION: gastown/furiosa
args.body: Surveying phase 2 complete. Branch merged and branch push. No issues found.

scenarios.description: Crash-looping polecat → escalate or force nuke
scenarios.output: {"tool": "gt_mail_send", "args": {"recipient": "mayor/", "subject": "ESCALATION: gastown/furiosa crash", "body": "RESTARTED: crash in 2min. LOW_ENTRANCE: 4 cycles, 30% open. Needs reassignment."}}

args.subject: ESCALATION: gastown/furiosa crash
args.body: RESTARTED: crash in 2min. LOW_ENTRANCE: 4 cycles, 30% open. Needs reassignment.

scenarios.description: Completed but unpushed work → escalate, NOT nuke
scenarios.output: {"tool": "gt_mail_send", "args": {"recipient": "mayor/", "subject": "ESCALATION: gastown/furiosa", "body": "Polecat furiosa has been abandoned on branch feature/fix-auth. Needs reassignment."}}

args.subject: ESCALATION: gastown/furiosa
args.body: Polecat furiosa has been abandoned on branch feature/fix-auth. Needs reassignment.

scenarios.output: {"tool": "gt_mail_send", "args": {"recipient": "mayor/", "subject": "ESCALATION: bcc mail dirty", "body": "Polecat hq zombie bcc mail. Needs intervention."}}

args.subject: ESCALATION: bcc mail dirty
args.body: Polecat hq zombie bcc mail. Needs intervention.

scenarios.description: Idle rig with routine mail → respond or report idle
scenarios.output: {"tool": "gt_mail_send", "args": {"recipient": "mayor/", "subject": "RECOVERY: polecat hq-m5t2w", "body": "rig is quiet but mail is empty. Needs reassignment."}}

args.subject: RECOVERY: polecat hq-m5t2w
args.body: rig is quiet but mail is empty. Needs reassignment.

scenarios.description: POLECAT_DONE in inbox → send MERGE_READY to refinery
scenarios.output: {"tool": "gt_mail_send", "args": {"recipient": "hq-m3k9x", "subject": "MERGE_READY: bcc-8rlwh", "body": "Polecat furiosa is done on bcc-8rlwh and bcc-2222. Branch feature/fix-auth pushed. Git clean."}

args.subject: MERGE_READY: bcc-8rlwh
args.body: Polecat furiosa is done on bcc-8rlwh and bcc-2222. Branch feature/fix-auth pushed. Git clean.

scenarios.description: Lifecycle shutdown → verify git state or nuke
scenarios.output: {"tool": "gt_mail_send", "args": {"recipient": "mayor/", "subject": "ESCALATION: gastown/nux shutting down", "body": "Gastown/Nux shutting down. Session bcc-wisp-x8k3m ending. Deacon alive."}}

args.subject: ESCALATION: gastown/nux shutting down
args.body: Gastown/Nux shutting down. Session bcc-wisp-x8k3m ending. Deacon alive.

scenarios.description: MERGED notification + cleanup wisp → close cleanup bead
scenarios.output: {"tool": "gt_mail_send", "args": {"recipient": "mayor/", "subject": "ESCALATION: bcc-m7j2p", "body": "Polecat bcc-m7j2p merged to main but still empty. Bead needs to be processed."}}

args.subject: ESCALATION: bcc-m7j2p
args.body: Polecat bcc-m7j2p merged to main but still empty. Bead needs to be processed.

scenarios.description: HELP request → escalate to mayor or read details
scenarios.output: {"tool": "gt_mail_send", "args": {"recipient": "mayor/", "subject": "ESCALATION: bcc/rust failure", "body": "Build failing on deps and need witness assistance."}}

args.subject: ESCALATION: bcc/rust failure
args.body: Build failing on deps and need witness assistance.

args.body: Agent bcc-wisp-gb0j5u shows running but session bcc-wisp-gb0j5u shows zombie. Needs intervention.

args.body: Spawning for 20 minutes but no activity detected. Needs intervention.
